items.name: Dead Diver's Tail
items.description:
𝙍𝙀𝙌𝙐𝙄𝙍𝙀𝙈𝙀𝙉𝙏𝙎: 𝘐𝘯𝘧𝘦𝘳𝘯𝘢𝘭 𝘋𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘩𝘸𝘢𝘭𝘬𝘦𝘳 𝘰𝘳 𝘋𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘩𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘬𝘦𝘳 𝘭𝘦𝘨𝘴. 𝘔𝘢𝘥𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘧𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘤𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘴𝘪𝘤 𝘙𝘰𝘣𝘭𝘰𝘹 𝘚𝘬𝘦𝘭𝘦𝘵𝘰𝘯 𝘣𝘰𝘥𝘺.
────────────────────────────────
It does not belong to a mermaid nor a siren, but something sinister that manifests to those who were lost to the depths of the abyss. Do not go looking for the forgotten. You do not want them looking for you.
